It enforces strict mode, defines the `__esModule` property for compatibility, and includes a source map comment for debugging.\n\n---\n\n### Step 1: Confirm if the reported issues are present in the code\n\n**Observation:**  \nAll reports accurately describe the code as a source map reference with no data input/output, no data flows, and no suspicious behavior.
